items.title: Now's AI Control Tower Adoption Rises: Can It Boost RPO Growth?
items.description: ServiceNow's AI Control Tower sees rising adoption across industries, fueling cRPO growth and extending market reach.

items.title: UiPath Stock Falls 11% in 3 Months: Should You Buy the Dip or Wait?
items.description: UiPath stock slides 11% in three months, but strong automation demand, key tech partnerships and solid finances keep it in focus.

items.title: AI models are 'not a recipe' for high equity returns: Strategist
items.description: Artificial intelligence stocks are facing bubble concerns as investors question long-term profitability. Peter Berezin, BCA Research Chief Global Strategist and Director of Research, and Patrick Moorhead, Moor Insights & Strategy Founder, CEO & Chief Analyst, discuss risks tied to high costs and commoditized tech. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Opening Bid.

items.title: Salesforce.com (CRM) Is Considered a Good Investment by Brokers: Is That True?
items.description: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Salesforce.com (CRM) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?

items.title: Dragos Names Eric Cross as CRO to Drive Global Growth and Deepen Category Leadership in OT Cybersecurity
items.description: HANOVER, Md., August 19, 2025--Dragos Inc., the global leader in cybersecurity for operational technology (OT) environments, today announced the appointment of Eric Cross as Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). Cross will lead all global go-to-market functions, including sales, customer success, partner and channel ecosystems, and marketing, as the company continues to deliver on its mission to safeguard industrial and critical infrastructure.
